Furthermore, while the restroom facilities are accessible, the interior doors do not have automatic openers, requiring manual effort that can be difficult for some users. Additionally, signage throughout the grounds occasionally relies on standard fonts rather than braille or large print, reducing visibility for visually impaired visitors.
